content.rendered:
Reporting to:
Head – Technical

Job Description & Key Focus Areas:

  • Review and formulate various reports on Transport Planning / Transportation Engineering
  • Manage clients at all levels
  • Supervise project management consultant work carried out by sub-consultants
  • Oversee documentation prepared by sub-consultants
  • Plan project implementation as per contractual arrangements with clients

Specific Demands of the Job:

  • The job will require regular travel for project development

Qualifications:

  • Given the job profile, relevant qualifications, experience, and aptitude are important.
    The candidate should be a Post-Graduate in Transport Planning / Transportation Engineering.

Post-Qualification Experience:

  • Around 8 to 12 years of experience in Transport Planning (advisory), with a focus on supervision,
    implementation, and management of schemes/projects, project delivery, and business development.

Competencies Required:

  • Transport Planning expertise in:

1. Non-Motorised Transport
2. City Bus Services (CBS)
3. Mass Rapid Transit Systems (MRTS)
4. Comprehensive Mobility Plans (CMP) / Comprehensive Traffic and Transport Studies
5. Traffic Engineering in Road and Junction Design
6. Transit-Oriented Development

  • Knowledge of Transport Demand Modelling (software such as VISSIM, VISUM, Cube)
  • Strong report writing and PowerPoint presentation skills
  • Knowledge of government policies and frameworks related to development and social welfare programmes
  • Experience handling project relationships across multi-agency environments
  • Ability to supervise outsourced work and manage the quality of outputs
  • Ability to work across domains and quickly grasp essentials to deliver projects
  • Knowledge of financial modelling in the transport sector would be an added advantage
